videos.headline: Mike Elko recaps No. 3 Texas A&M's historical game vs. South Carolina
videos.description: Elko describes the incredible grit and togetherness of the Aggies as they complete the largest comeback in school history after erasing a 27-point deficit vs. the Gamecocks.

videos.headline: Marcel Reed explains Aggies' belief in insane comeback vs. South Carolina
videos.description: Reed speaks on the No. 3 Texas A&M's belief and what was said to change the mindset at halftime to produce a much more physical team in the incredible comeback win over the Gamecocks.
